lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਵਤ ਦੇਵ ਸਬੈ ਮੁਨਿ ਇੰਦ੍ਰ ਮਹਾ ਸਿਵ ਜੋਗ ਕਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: ant na paavat dev sabai mun indr mahaa siv jog karee |
lines.english: All the gods, silent sages, Indra, Shiva and Yogis have not found the Lord's limits

lines.gurmukhi: ਫੁਨਿ ਬੇਦ ਬਿਰੰਚਿ ਬਿਚਾਰਿ ਰਹਿਓ ਹਰਿ ਜਾਪੁ ਨ ਛਾਡੵਿਉ ਏਕ ਘਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: fun bed biranch bichaar rahio har jaap na chhaaddayiau ek gharee |
lines.english: not even Brahma who contemplates the Vedas. I shall not give up meditating on the Lord, even for an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਥੁਰਾ ਜਨ ਕੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਦੀਨ ਦਯਾਲੁ ਹੈ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਸ੍ਰਿਸ੍ਟਿ ਨਿਹਾਲੁ ਕਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: mathuraa jan ko prabh deen dayaal hai sangat srisatt nihaal karee |
lines.english: The God of Mat'huraa is Merciful to the meek; He blesses and uplifts the Sangats throughout the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮਦਾਸਿ ਗੁਰੂ ਜਗ ਤਾਰਨ ਕਉ ਗੁਰ ਜੋਤਿ ਅਰਜੁਨ ਮਾਹਿ ਧਰੀ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: raamadaas guroo jag taaran kau gur jot arajun maeh dharee |4|
lines.english: Guru Raam Daas, to save the world, enshrined the Guru's Light into Guru Arjun. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗ ਅਉਰੁ ਨ ਯਾਹਿ ਮਹਾ ਤਮ ਮੈ ਅਵਤਾਰੁ ਉਜਾਗਰੁ ਆਨਿ ਕੀਅਉ ॥
lines.translit: jag aaur na yaeh mahaa tam mai avataar ujaagar aan keeo |
lines.english: In the great darkness of this world, the Lord revealed Himself, incarnated as Guru Arjun.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੇ ਦੁਖ ਕੋਟਿਕ ਦੂਰਿ ਗਏ ਮਥੁਰਾ ਜਿਨੑ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਪੀਅਉ ॥
lines.translit: tin ke dukh kottik door ge mathuraa jina amrit naam peeo |
lines.english: Millions of pains are taken away, from those who drink in the Ambrosial Nectar of the Naam, says Mat'huraa.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹ ਪਧਤਿ ਤੇ ਮਤ ਚੂਕਹਿ ਰੇ ਮਨ ਭੇਦੁ ਬਿਭੇਦੁ ਨ ਜਾਨ ਬੀਅਉ ॥
lines.translit: eih padhat te mat chookeh re man bhed bibhed na jaan beeo |
lines.english: O mortal being, do not leave this path; do not think that there is any difference between God and Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਲਉ ਨਹੀ ਭਾਗ ਲਿਲਾਰ ਉਦੈ ਤਬ ਲਉ ਭ੍ਰਮਤੇ ਫਿਰਤੇ ਬਹੁ ਧਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: jab lau nahee bhaag lilaar udai tab lau bhramate firate bahu dhaayau |
lines.english: As long as the destiny written upon my forehead was not activated, I wandered around lost, running in all directions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਤਛਿ ਰਿਦੈ ਗੁਰ ਅਰਜੁਨ ਕੈ ਹਰਿ ਪੂਰਨ ਬ੍ਰਹਮਿ ਨਿਵਾਸੁ ਲੀਅਉ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: paratachh ridai gur arajun kai har pooran braham nivaas leeo |5|
lines.english: The Perfect Lord God has manifested Himself; He dwells in the heart of Guru Arjun. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿ ਘੋਰ ਸਮੁਦ੍ਰ ਮੈ ਬੂਡਤ ਥੇ ਕਬਹੂ ਮਿਟਿ ਹੈ ਨਹੀ ਰੇ ਪਛੁਤਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: kal ghor samudr mai booddat the kabahoo mitt hai nahee re pachhutaayau |
lines.english: I was drowning in the horrible world-ocean of this Dark Age of Kali Yuga, and my remorse would never have ended.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਤੁ ਬਿਚਾਰੁ ਯਹੈ ਮਥੁਰਾ ਜਗ ਤਾਰਨ ਕਉ ਅਵਤਾਰੁ ਬਨਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: tat bichaar yahai mathuraa jag taaran kau avataar banaayau |
lines.english: O Mat'huraa, consider this essential truth: to save the world, the Lord incarnated Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪੵਉ ਜਿਨੑ ਅਰਜੁਨ ਦੇਵ ਗੁਰੂ ਫਿਰਿ ਸੰਕਟ ਜੋਨਿ ਗਰਭ ਨ ਆਯਉ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: japyau jina arajun dev guroo fir sankatt jon garabh na aayau |6|
lines.english: Whoever meditates on Guru Arjun Dayv, shall not have to pass through the painful womb of reincarnation ever again. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿ ਸਮੁਦ੍ਰ ਭਏ ਰੂਪ ਪ੍ਰਗਟਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਉਧਾਰਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: kal samudr bhe roop pragatt har naam udhaaran |
lines.english: In the ocean of this Dark Age of Kali Yuga, the Lord's Name has been revealed in the Form of Guru Arjun, to save the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲ ਭੇਖ ਅਪਾਰ ਤਾਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: niramal bhekh apaar taas bin avar na koee |
lines.english: He is the Pure, Immaculate Form of the Infinite Lord; except for Him, there is no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਬਚ ਜਿਨਿ ਜਾਣਿਅਉ ਭਯਉ ਤਿਹ ਸਮਸਰਿ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: man bach jin jaaniaau bhyau tih samasar soee |
lines.english: Whoever knows Him in thought, word and deed, becomes just like Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਸਹਿ ਸੰਤ ਜਿਸੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਦੁਖ ਦਾਰਿਦ੍ਰ ਨਿਵਾਰਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: baseh sant jis ridai dukh daaridr nivaaran |
lines.english: Pain and poverty are taken away from that person, within whose heart the Saint abides.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਨਿ ਗਗਨ ਨਵ ਖੰਡ ਮਹਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਸ੍ਵਰੂਪੀ ਰਹਿਓ ਭਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: dharan gagan nav khandd meh jot svaroopee rahio bhar |
lines.english: He is totally pervading the earth, the sky and the nine regions of the planet. He is the Embodiment of the Light of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਜੈ ਗੰਗ ਜਲੁ ਅਟਲੁ ਸਿਖ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਸਭ ਨਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: ajai gang jal attal sikh sangat sabh naavai |
lines.english: The stream of the Lord's Name flows like the Ganges, invincible and unstoppable. The Sikhs of the Sangat all bathe in it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਨਿ ਮਥੁਰਾ ਕਛੁ ਭੇਦੁ ਨਹੀ ਗੁਰੁ ਅਰਜੁਨੁ ਪਰਤਖੵ ਹਰਿ ॥੭॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: bhan mathuraa kachh bhed nahee gur arajun paratakhay har |7|19|
lines.english: So speaks Mat'huraa: there is no difference between God and Guru; Guru Arjun is the Personification of the Lord Himself. ||7||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਤ ਪੁਰਾਣ ਬਾਚੀਅਹਿ ਬੇਦ ਬ੍ਰਹਮਾ ਮੁਖਿ ਗਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: nit puraan baacheeeh bed brahamaa mukh gaavai |
lines.english: It appears as if the holy texts like the Puraanaas are being recited there and Brahma himself sings the Vedas.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਜੈ ਚਵਰੁ ਸਿਰਿ ਢੁਲੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਮੁਖਿ ਲੀਅਉ ॥
lines.translit: ajai chavar sir dtulai naam amrit mukh leeo |
lines.english: The invincible chauri, the fly-brush, waves over His head; with His mouth, He drinks in the Ambrosial Nectar of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਅੰਗਦ ਅਮਰ ਗੁਰ ਗੁਰੁ ਰਾਮਦਾਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਪਹਿ ਗਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: mil naanak angad amar gur gur raamadaas har peh gyau |
lines.english: Guru Nanak, Guru Angad, Guru Amar Daas and Guru Raam Daas met together before the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਅਰਜੁਨ ਸਿਰਿ ਛਤ੍ਰੁ ਆਪਿ ਪਰਮੇਸਰਿ ਦੀਅਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur arajun sir chhatru aap paramesar deeo |
lines.english: The Transcendent Lord Himself has placed the royal canopy over the head of Guru Arjun.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿਬੰਸ ਜਗਤਿ ਜਸੁ ਸੰਚਰੵਉ ਸੁ ਕਵਣੁ ਕਹੈ ਸ੍ਰੀ ਗੁਰੁ ਮੁਯਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: haribans jagat jas sancharyau su kavan kahai sree gur muyau |1|
lines.english: So speaks HARBANS: Their Praises echo and resound all over the world; who can possibly say that the Great Gurus are dead? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਵ ਪੁਰੀ ਮਹਿ ਗਯਉ ਆਪਿ ਪਰਮੇਸ੍ਵਰ ਭਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: dev puree meh gyau aap paramesvar bhaayau |
lines.english: When it was the Will of the Transcendent Lord Himself, Guru Raam Daas went to the City of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਿੰਘਾਸਣੁ ਦੀਅਉ ਸਿਰੀ ਗੁਰੁ ਤਹ ਬੈਠਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: har singhaasan deeo siree gur teh baitthaayau |
lines.english: The Lord offered Him His Royal Throne, and seated the Guru upon it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਹਸੁ ਕੀਅਉ ਸੁਰ ਦੇਵ ਤੋਹਿ ਜਸੁ ਜਯ ਜਯ ਜੰਪਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: rehas keeo sur dev tohi jas jay jay janpeh |
lines.english: The angels and gods were delighted; they proclaimed and celebrated Your victory, O Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਸੁਰ ਗਏ ਤੇ ਭਾਗਿ ਪਾਪ ਤਿਨੑ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਕੰਪਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: asur ge te bhaag paap tina bheetar kanpeh |
lines.english: The demons ran away; their sins made them shake and tremble inside.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਟੇ ਸੁ ਪਾਪ ਤਿਨੑ ਨਰਹੁ ਕੇ ਗੁਰੁ ਰਾਮਦਾਸੁ ਜਿਨੑ ਪਾਇਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: kaatte su paap tina narahu ke gur raamadaas jina paaeiyau |
lines.english: Those people who found Guru Raam Daas were rid of their sins.

lines.translit: chhatru singhaasan pirathamee gur arajun kau de aaeaau |2|21|9|11|10|10|22|60|143|
lines.english: He gave the Royal Canopy and Throne to Guru Arjun, and came home. ||2||21||9||11||10||10||22||60||143||
